response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 'Planetarium' through on-screen text and performer context. 2. Identified song 'RELAY' through on-screen text 'RELAY' and 'Konami Amusement'. 3. Searched for official lyrics for both songs using original artists/composers (Ai Otsuka and Konami Amusement). 4. Found and formatted lyrics for both songs for the final JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two musical performances. The first is a cover of 'Planetarium' by Ai Otsuka, performed by VTubers Shirogane Noel and Shiranui Flare. The second is a performance of 'RELAY' from 'Power Pros 2024-2025', performed by VTubers Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine, and Usada Pekora.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel and Shiranui Flare perform the song 'Planetarium' on a virtual stage. The background features a planetarium-themed set with many virtual audience members holding light sticks.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Evening moon appearing
Vanishing children's voices
Far, far away, somewhere in this sky
You must be there
We snuck out together at the end of summer
Found it in this park
Do you remember what constellation that was?
Even if we can't meet, I'll trace my memories
I want to see the same happiness
Along with that scent, fireworks burst open
I want to go to you
I want to run to you right now
It's pitch black, I can't see anything
Even if I'm afraid, it's okay
The countless starry sky
Is still right here
I won't cry, because it was a beautiful sky
I saw with you long ago
Along that road, the echoing
Sound of shoes remains in my ears
Staring at my own large shadow
I wonder what I'm thinking
Even though it shouldn't have changed at all
These painful feelings keep swelling up
No matter how much I miss you
You're already gone
I want to go to your side
Even if I'm small, even if I'm small
I love you the most
I can be strong
I whispered a wish to a shooting star
I won't cry, it will reach
That beautiful sky
Even if we can't meet, I'll trace my memories
I want to see the same happiness
Along with that scent, fireworks burst open
I want to go to you
Clutching our small hands
I want to cry, it was, oh it was
A beautiful sky
I whispered a wish to a shooting star
I want to cry, my unreachable feelings
Into this sky
